title: Alkaline-SDS Cell Lysis of Microbes for Proteomic Sample Preparation
author: Yan Chen
materials: Start with 10 µL of cells per well a non-skirted PCR plate (Thermo Scientific, Cat.#AB0600). Plate of cell pellets When processing larger amounts of biomass increase reagent volumes accordingly. This protocol works in larger formats (e.g., 1.7 mL Eppendorf tubes) too.

steps.title: Resuspend the cell pellet in lysis...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cell pellet in lysis buffer on a plate mixer. Ensure proper mixing of the cell lysis buffer and the cell pellet. Plate mixer Cells resuspended in lysis buffer

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.75 µL 1 Molarity (M), Hydrochloric acid (Sigma Cat.#320331) to each well.

steps.title: Add 25 µL, 100 mM Ammonium bicarbonate (VWR Scientific Cat
steps.instruction: Add 25 µL, 100 mM Ammonium bicarbonate (VWR Scientific Cat.#BJ40867-50G) and 0.5 µL, Benzonase nuclease (Millipore Cat.#70746) to each well.

steps.title: Mix thoroughly on the plate mixer
steps.instruction: Mix thoroughly on the plate mixer. Cell lysate after benzonase treatment

steps.title: Add 200 µL, 100% Acetone (Sigma Cat
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL, 100% Acetone (Sigma Cat.#179124) to each well and let sit at room temperature for 5 minutes. Protein precipitation after mixing in 100% acetone

steps.title: Add 60 µL of 100 millimolar...
steps.instruction: Add 60 µL of 100 millimolar (mM), Ammonium bicarbonate in 10% Methanol to each well to resuspend protein pellet. Protein pellet resuspended in 60 uL of Ammonium bicarbonate in 10% Methanol

steps.title: Remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant. Protein pellet after centrifugation and removal of supernatant

steps.title: Wash protein pellet twice using 150...
steps.instruction: Wash protein pellet twice using 150 µL, 80% Acetone (Sigma Cat.#179124) . Increase the number of washes depending on the sample matrix background.

steps.title: Store at -20 °C until ready...
steps.instruction: Store at -20 °C until ready for Automated Protein Quantitation with the Biomek-FX liquid handler system .

steps.title: Add 25 µL of alkaline-SDS cell...
steps.instruction: Add 25 µL of alkaline-SDS cell lysis buffer (200 mM NaOH, 1% SDS) to each well.
